title: The Ravaged Pantry
shortStory: Someone raided the restaurant pantry after closing hours.

actions.label: Check the floor
actions.description: Look for dropped food on the floor.
actions.observationText: Spilled goods scatter {movementWord} across the pantry floor.

actions.label: Search the shelves
actions.observationText: The shelves are disorganized but reveal no suspect.

actions.label: Ask the chef
actions.description: Who was in the kitchen last?
actions.observationText: The chef recalls hearing rustling after closing.

actions.label: Measure the marks
actions.observationText: Medium marks run across the stainless steel counter.

sizeOverrides.small: Fine light marks sit low on the counter edge.
sizeOverrides.large: Deep gouges run across the counter surface.

actions.label: Follow the trail
actions.observationText: A streak of {textureWord} trails across the counter.

actions.label: Photograph the counter
actions.observationText: The photo captures it but reveals nothing more.

locations.name: Walk-in Fridge
locations.teaserText: The cold room floor shows signs of activity.

actions.label: Check under the shelving
actions.observationText: The {groundWord} near the fridge base was disturbed.

actions.label: Check the top shelves
actions.observationText: The top shelves are frosted but undisturbed.

actions.label: Listen for drips
actions.observationText: The fridge hums quietly. No one is inside.

locations.name: Dining Room
locations.teaserText: The locked cabinet door was tampered with.

actions.label: Inspect the cabinet lock
actions.description: Check how the lock was forced.
actions.observationText: Fine scratch marks circle the cabinet lock.

actions.label: Smell the cabinet
actions.observationText: It smells of old wood and polish. Nothing useful.

actions.label: Check the dining table
actions.observationText: Whoever took from the cabinet worked {movementWord} along the table.

locations.name: Back Alley
locations.teaserText: A delivery person noticed something odd.

actions.label: Interview the delivery person
actions.observationText: The delivery person is certain about the detail.

actions.label: Check the drain
actions.description: Inspect the ground near the drain.
actions.observationText: Even near the drain, a line of {textureWord} stayed behind.

actions.label: Check the delivery crates
actions.observationText: The crates are stacked neatly. Nothing is hidden.

type-residue-clue.title: Counter Trace
type-residue-clue.clueText: A trail of {textureWord} stretched across the kitchen counter.

force-clue.endExplanation: The culprit left {forceTrace} while forcing the pantry open.
